obj_dw_flowerydash_slash_Step_0_gml_92_0: \EF* Heheh..^1. you..^1. almost got past me for a second there!/
obj_dw_flowerydash_slash_Step_0_gml_93_0: \EE* But wake up^1, Kris^1! I can NEVER lose to you.../
obj_dw_flowerydash_slash_Step_0_gml_130_: \EG* Watch and learn^1, Kris..^1. the TRUE power of friendship!/%
obj_dw_flowery_tree_slash_Step_0_gml_143: \EU* You know..^1. your magic can't heal this..^1. so..^1. why.../%
obj_dw_flowery_tree_slash_Step_0_gml_184: \Ei* I have to try^1, you know!?/%
obj_dw_flowery_tree_slash_Step_0_gml_209: \EU* I..^1. I'm fine^1, princess..^1. I just need..^1. a little water./
obj_dw_flowery_tree_slash_Step_0_gml_211: \EY* Damn it..^1. flowers really are useless^1, aren't they?/
obj_dw_flowery_tree_slash_Step_0_gml_212: \EX* They sit around looking beautiful^1, then they wither away.../
obj_dw_flowery_tree_slash_Step_0_gml_213: \EW* Now^1, our caretaker is gone^1, and we'll.../
obj_dw_flowery_tree_slash_Step_0_gml_216: \Ec* We'll..^1. we'll take care of you!/
obj_dw_flowery_tree_slash_Step_0_gml_218: \EU* Give you light..^1. and water..^1. and stuff!/
obj_dw_flowery_tree_slash_Step_0_gml_219: \Ec* And then..^1. we'll go and get ASGORE back!/
obj_dw_flowery_tree_slash_Step_0_gml_221: \EU* Haha^1, Susie..^1. how sweet you are./
obj_dw_flowery_tree_slash_Step_0_gml_226: \EX* Us plants^1, are neither Darkners nor Lightners./
obj_dw_flowery_tree_slash_Step_0_gml_228: \EX* ..^1. that take on new consciousness in the dark./
obj_dw_flowery_tree_slash_Step_0_gml_230: \EX* We can feel things others can't understand.../
obj_dw_flowery_tree_slash_Step_0_gml_231: \EY* Something horrible is stirring underneath the town./
obj_dw_flowery_tree_slash_Step_0_gml_235: \EX* The road ahead of you is draped in shadow^1, but.../
obj_dw_flowery_tree_slash_Step_0_gml_237: \EW* But I know you can do it^1, as long as you stay together./
obj_dw_flowery_tree_slash_Step_0_gml_239: \EU* You two..^1. have the inner light that can save this world./
obj_dw_flowery_tree_slash_Step_0_gml_241: \EV* I..^1. just wish I wasn't..^1. so useless..../
obj_dw_flowery_tree_slash_Step_0_gml_246: \Ea* Having something to take care of.../
obj_dw_flowery_tree_slash_Step_0_gml_248: \Ek* Just being a flower..^1. that's enough for him!/
obj_dw_flowery_tree_slash_Step_0_gml_252: \EW* You're not half bad yourself^1, you know that?/
obj_dw_flowery_tree_slash_Step_0_gml_253: \EU* Maybe in another life^1, we could have..^1. been friends.../%
obj_dw_flowery_tree_slash_Step_0_gml_311: \Ea* You two..^1. go seal the Fountain^1, okay?/
obj_dw_flowery_tree_slash_Step_0_gml_408: \E8* ..^1. he just had to go and be dramatic^1, didn't he./
obj_dw_flowery_tree_slash_Step_0_gml_414: \Ea* Kris..^1. please go seal the Fountain./%
obj_dw_garden_aqua_slash_Step_0_gml_185_: * You hear me^1? Make sure they don't get past here and find that FEATHER./
obj_dw_garden_aqua_slash_Step_0_gml_189_: * Because..^1. it'll let them get to the next area!/
obj_dw_garden_aqua_slash_Step_0_gml_193_: * Because..^1. because..^1. that's what HE said!/
obj_dw_garden_aqua_slash_Step_0_gml_197_: * Look^1! They're coming this way^1! I have to go^1, just make sure they don't get past!/%
obj_dw_garden_aqua_slash_Step_0_gml_351_: * I see you have naturally blue skin just like me./%
obj_dw_garden_aqua_slash_Step_0_gml_362_: * Purple skin and teeth^1, just like my friend./%
obj_dw_garden_aqua_slash_Step_0_gml_384_: * So glad to meet some more people like me./
obj_dw_garden_aqua_slash_Step_0_gml_388_: * What^1? Are you going to ask if you can get to the feather?/
obj_dw_garden_aqua_slash_Step_0_gml_389_: * Uuu..^1. I can't let you do that./
obj_dw_garden_aqua_slash_Step_0_gml_391_: \E6* We haven't asked about that yet./
obj_dw_garden_aqua_slash_Step_0_gml_393_: * You three seem like great humans^1. I'd love to give it to you./
obj_dw_garden_aqua_slash_Step_0_gml_398_: * Because..^1. I'm not supposed to^1, hee hee hee./
obj_dw_garden_aqua_slash_Step_0_gml_399_: * And being human is about not doing things you're not supposed to./
obj_dw_garden_aqua_slash_Step_0_gml_480_: * Hee hee hee^1, that's good^1, that's good!!/
obj_dw_garden_aqua_slash_Step_0_gml_481_: * I was hoping being human was about playing since I always wanted to play a game./
obj_dw_garden_aqua_slash_Step_0_gml_483_: \E1* How about if we play with you.../
obj_dw_garden_aqua_slash_Step_0_gml_485_: \E2* You give us that cool feather?/%
obj_dw_garden_aqua_slash_Step_0_gml_534_: \E3* Wait^1, do you even know what a game is?/
obj_dw_garden_aqua_slash_Step_0_gml_536_: \E2* Seems like she does to me./%
obj_dw_garden_aqua_slash_Step_0_gml_708_: \E2* Sick^1. Now all you gotta do is give us a prize./
obj_dw_garden_aqua_slash_Step_0_gml_712_: \EA* Yeah. The loser's always gotta give something to the winner./%
obj_dw_garden_aqua_slash_Step_0_gml_907_: \E8* She seemed like a nice girl after all./
obj_dw_garden_aqua_slash_Step_0_gml_911_: \E0* ..^1. wonder if that feather can really get us through?/%
